---
title: "Global Military Expenditures: A Visual History"
description: "An interactive scrollytelling visualization of world military spending from 1992 to 2024, built with SvelteKit and D3."
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  #milex-frame {
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    border: none;
    display: block;
  }
  /* Hide Quarto navbar/header when this page loads */
  .navbar, #quarto-header, #quarto-content > * > nav {
    display: none !important;
  }
  #quarto-content {
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
  }
  .page-layout-custom .content {
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
</style>

<iframe
  id="milex-frame"
  src="https://milex-website.vercel.app/"
  title="Global Military Expenditures: A Visual History 1992-2024"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
></iframe>
```
